title: SEssentials
description: Mod that add features essential to my Minecraft gameplay.
body:
This mod will never have great features or depth, its just couple of things that I find usefull when I play modded Minecraft.

### 1. Proximity Sensor :
Redstone "Device" that detects living entity or items in front of it and outputs redstone signal with strength based on distance from object.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-bYFyu0ki88" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### 2. Light Sensor :
Redstone "Device" that detects light level around it and outputs redstone signal with strength based on average light level around block.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EhZyCMK8_Ek" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
